description: federation descriptor canonical-message + id baseline (3-of-5, five guardians, lex-sorted)

expected.canonical_message:
oc-agent:federation:v1
threshold: 3-of-5
guardian: bc1qguardian1000000000000000000000000000000
guardian: bc1qguardian2000000000000000000000000000000
guardian: bc1qguardian3000000000000000000000000000000
guardian: bc1qguardian4000000000000000000000000000000
guardian: bc1qguardian5000000000000000000000000000000

notes: Verifiers MUST recompute descriptor_id from the canonical message (sorted-by-address guardian lines) and reject envelopes whose declared descriptor_id does not match. The canonical message excludes guardian.name (label) — names are JSON-only metadata, not part of the cryptographic identity.
